mechanics.excerpt: Most Combine citizens however, receive frce but ow-quality schooling: The Combine " heawy emphasis the needs of the state Over the student tends to stifle creativity and free thought: Students are typically barraged with aptitude tests with failures weeded out and funneled into technical schools The Capellan Confederation possesses one of the Inner Sphere Most comprehensive basic school systems, though as with the Combine the student" right to knowledge must give way to the needs of the state.
